name: Quick Rename
description: Prompt for a new base name and rename selected files.
script:
name="$(osascript -e 'text returned of (display dialog "New base name" default answer "file")')"
i=1
for item in "$@"; do
  dir="$(dirname "$item")"
  ext="${item##*.}"
  mv "$item" "$dir/$name-$(printf "%03d" "$i").$ext"
  i=$((i + 1))
done
